title: Urban Community Garden
problem: Many urban areas lack green spaces, reducing local food production and community engagement.
solution: Create community-managed gardens on vacant plots to grow organic vegetables and herbs.
description: This project will transform unused urban land into productive gardens, encouraging sustainable living, social interaction, and local food production.

title: Solar Rooftop Initiative
problem: High electricity costs and carbon emissions in urban homes.
solution: Install solar panels on residential rooftops to reduce dependency on grid electricity and promote renewable energy.
description: A community project to encourage rooftop solar installations, offering workshops and subsidies for low-income households.

title: Plastic-Free School Campaign
problem: Schools generate a large amount of plastic waste daily.
solution: Encourage students to use reusable bottles, lunch boxes, and ban single-use plastics in schools.
description: Implement awareness programs, competitions, and policies in schools to reduce plastic consumption and create eco-conscious students.

title: Eco-Friendly Product Marketplace
problem: Lack of access to verified eco-friendly products.
solution: Build an online marketplace where users can buy certified eco-friendly products from multiple vendors.
description: The platform will include product reviews, sustainability ratings, and direct vendor connections to promote conscious consumption.

title: Neighborhood Clean-Up Drive
problem: Local neighborhoods accumulate waste and litter due to lack of organized cleaning initiatives.
solution: Organize volunteer groups to regularly clean streets, parks, and public spaces.
description: Community members join clean-up drives, recycling collected waste, and creating awareness campaigns to maintain neighborhood cleanliness.
